sections.paragraph:
fut. יַחְבֹּט to beat out, or off, with a stick (Arab. خبط to beat off leaves with a stick).

(1) to beat off apples or olives from the tree, Deu 24:20 Isa 27:12.

(2) to beat out or thresh corn with a stick or flail, Jud. 6:11 Rth 2:17. (Arab. خبط.)

Niphal, pass. of No. 2, Isa 28:27.
